reviews.review_body: Excellent experience in this school. Activities are very nice 👌. Way of teaching method is very good .Take care of every student.

reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body:
Overall experience is satisfactory.
I appreciate the efforts the school is making towards providing  a good learning environment. The teachers are supportive and committed to the growth. However, I would like to highlight one concern. Since the beginning of the semester, there have been frequent changes in the teachers for classes. This has made it a little difficult for children to adjust, as each teacher has a different teaching style, and it sometimes affects the continuity of learning.
I believe having more stability with the teaching staff would help them concentrate better and improve  academic progress. I am confident that the school will look into this matter and take steps to provide students with consistent guidance.
Overall, I value the opportunities and facilities the school provides, and I look forward to seeing this area improve for the benefit of all students.
